title: Enterprise Risk & Controls

acceptanceScenarios.name: Create durable control packet
acceptanceScenarios.given: The tenant has contract compliance packets, governance packets, assistant audit events, action queue items, SCRI events, and risk war rooms.
acceptanceScenarios.when: A risk or compliance owner opens Sprint 2 and clicks Create Sprint 2 packet.
acceptanceScenarios.then: The app persists an AssistantEnterpriseRiskControlPacket with obligation graph, control testing, audit evidence, contract performance, regulatory horizon, external risk, response plan, rollback plan, and leadership summary.

acceptanceScenarios.name: Queue remediation review
acceptanceScenarios.given: A Sprint 2 packet has high risk score or open control gaps.
acceptanceScenarios.when: The user adds a review note and clicks Queue review.
acceptanceScenarios.then: The packet moves to REVIEW_QUEUED, an AssistantActionQueueItem is created, and an AssistantAuditEvent records that remediation is approval-gated.

acceptanceScenarios.name: Approve without silent mutation
acceptanceScenarios.given: A human reviewer has validated the packet and supporting evidence.
acceptanceScenarios.then: The packet is marked APPROVED with approver metadata while obligations, controls, contracts, policies, risk events, audit evidence, action queue decisions, and operational source records remain unchanged.

guardrails: Packet creation never changes obligations, controls, contracts, policies, SCRI events, risk rooms, audit evidence, or operational source records.
Regulatory horizon and external risk summaries draft review work only; filings, policy changes, and external communications require separate approval.
Action queue handoff is explicit and auditable.
